purpose.cmd/functional-clusters: Thin CLI executable entrypoint that delegates command handling to internal/cli.
purpose.internal/cli: Command-line parsing, version reporting, help text, and process exit behavior.
purpose.root: Go module metadata, source installer, build targets, repository guardrails, and agent configuration.

hints.add_feature: For new CLI-visible behavior, start in internal/cli and keep cmd/functional-clusters as a thin process entrypoint.

architecture.ai_summary: Functional Clusters is initialized as a small Go CLI. The cmd/functional-clusters package owns only process wiring, while internal/cli contains command behavior and version/help output. Root build files follow the source-install pattern used by sibling Go projects, with make build, make test, make install, and install.sh verifying that installed binaries can report their build provenance.
